title: Track upstream HKDF/HMAC transient wiping
description: HMAC 0.13 key setup and HKDF 0.13 expansion use private call-local key-pad/output arrays without zeroization. Application wrappers cannot safely access them, and replacing vetted primitives locally violates LICHEN crypto policy. Track upstream feature/API support or audited dependency releases, then enable them and extend structural ZeroizeOnDrop assertions.
close_reason: Completed upstream tracking and zeroize enablement for HKDF/HMAC in Rust deps; all updates, assertions, tests done and verified with 3 codereview passes; no blockers; closed parent+child.
